description_long: This is a classic freestanding bathtub with a deep, oval-shaped basin and a smooth, glossy white interior. The exterior is finished in a contrasting black color, giving it a striking, elegant appearance. The tub is supported by four ornate, clawfoot-style legs, which elevate it above the ground and add a touch of vintage charm. The rim is gently rounded, and the interior is spacious enough to comfortably accommodate an adult. A drainage hole is visible at the base of the tub, and there is a small overflow hole near the upper rim. No visible plumbing fixtures such as faucets or handles are present on the tub itself.
description: A freestanding, clawfoot bathtub with a glossy white interior and black exterior, featuring ornate legs and a visible drainage hole.
description_view_0: Side view showing the elongated oval shape, black exterior, and two clawfoot legs.
description_view_1: End view highlighting the depth of the tub, rounded rim, and the black exterior with two visible legs.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, showing the full length and two clawfoot legs.
description_view_3: View from the opposite end, clearly showing the white interior, drainage hole, and overflow hole near the rim.

license_info.creator_display_name: Museum of Engineering and Technology, Krakow
